message:
fix(api): add #[must_use] to wavelet_tree, rope, and suffix_array public APIs

wavelet_tree (10 methods): new, len, is_empty, access, rank, select,
  range_count, quantile, range_frequencies, alphabet_size
rope (10 methods): new, from_str, len, is_empty, char_at, substring,
  to_string_full, line_count, line, node_count
suffix_array (11 methods): new, from_str, len, is_empty, suffix_array,
  lcp_array, text, search, search_str, count, count_str,
  longest_repeated_substring, longest_repeated_substring_str,
  distinct_substring_count

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
